validate-json.observation: menu-schema.json valid JSON with 7 menu items

check-field-naming.observation: qty found only in outbox/order-context/processed/ (historical processed order snapshots) — outside active documentation scope per VAL-CROSS-003

check-forbidden-words.command: grep forbidden words in SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md and AGENTS.md
check-forbidden-words.observation: Forbidden words appear only in technical instruction contexts (forbidden words list, QRIS procedure, file path references). No forbidden words in customer-facing content.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The config-worker skill procedure lists `jq . <file>` verification unconditionally. Clarify that JSON validation only applies when JSON files are modified, not markdown files. This is a minor clarification to prevent unnecessary verification steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature restructure-main-prompt edited only markdown (SOBATNGUPI_PROMPT.md) and correctly skipped JSON validation. Worker applied judgment. Skill procedure could be clearer.

rejectedObservations.observation: TOOLS.md contains localhost:3001 URLs — suggested as potential forbidden word violation
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as ambiguity. TOOLS.md is an internal technical document, not customer-facing. AGENTS.md forbids exposing these to customers, not referencing them internally. This is consistent with architecture.md which documents the backend at localhost:3001. The forbidden-word rule is correctly applied — internal docs can reference localhost, only customer-facing content must not.
